description: Ground truth for sandbox patient-trial matching evaluation

pairs.notes: T2DM, HbA1c 8.2%, on metformin, BMI 31.1 — meets all SGLT2 trial criteria
HbA1c 8.2%, BMI >30, age 45 within range — meets GLP-1 trial criteria
PD-L1 60% ≥50%, ECOG 1, stage IIIB — meets anti-PD-1 criteria
No EGFR mutation documented — fails key inclusion
HER2+, prior trastuzumab, liver mets — meets ADC trial criteria
Patient is HER2+ but trial requires HR+/HER2-
MMSE 22 within 20-26, age 74 within range — meets amyloid trial
Age 74 in range, early AD — tau trial possible but less data
Treatment-naive, CD4 350 >200 — meets long-acting ART criteria
Treatment-naive, trial requires stable ART ≥2 years
eGFR 38 within 25-60, diabetic nephropathy — meets CKD SGLT2 criteria
Hgb not specified — HIF trial requires Hgb <10
Age 8, 3 ED visits/year ≥2, moderate persistent — meets biologic criteria
Age 8 below trial minimum of 12
TRD, failed 3 SSRIs + 1 SNRI (≥2 failed), PHQ-9 22 — meets esketamine criteria
MDD, age 41 in range — psilocybin trial possible
HbSS, 6 VOCs/year ≥4, on hydroxyurea — meets gene therapy criteria
Not documented as transfusion-dependent
DAS28 5.8 >5.1, RF+ — meets JAK inhibitor criteria
RF+, seropositive RA — meets anti-TNF biosimilar criteria
Age 5, severe P. falciparum, Hgb 5.2 — meets IV artesunate trial
Age 5y too old for 5-17mo vaccine trial; has active malaria
MDR-TB (INH+RIF resistant), age 35, HIV- — meets BPaL criteria
Active TB, trial is for latent TB prevention only
